message:
fix(futures): add fail-closed terminal-state guards to 7 Future implementations

Futures that silently re-complete when polled after returning Poll::Ready
violate the Future contract and can mask bugs. Add `completed: bool` field
+ assert guard to: Copy, CopyBuf, CopyWithProgress, CopyBidirectional
(io/copy.rs), ReadLine (io/read_line.rs), Select, SelectAll
(combinator/select.rs), YieldNow (runtime/yield_now.rs), and Sleep
(time/sleep.rs). Includes 3 regression tests for repoll-after-completion.

Closes asupersync-4vjh2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
